data.body: RESOLUTION (duplicate — fix already landed on main): while change 710 awaited its gates, commit 7a0fac8f5e17d3a0e48ed38b702d187348c6ce94 (ticket taxing-quasilegal-incatern / b27d-269a-2ba3-43b4, Gerrit Change-Id Ie8687b93e0d6f9d32d3389e5bfd4a80697fe4e1d) landed the SAME fix: fs_tools._is_dependency_path() (site-packages/dist-packages/.venv/venv path components) now gates the repo-local classification in pai_tools resolve_symbol BEFORE root containment, with regression tests test_resolve_symbol_repo_nested_venv_is_third_party (monkeypatched origin under repo_root/.venv/lib/py/site-packages -> third-party; AC2), test_resolve_symbol_first_party_src_is_repo_local, and test_is_dependency_path_flags_install_and_venv_roots. My Gerrit change 710 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/710) reached LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 with 0 unresolved comments, but submit 409ed on a textual conflict with 7a0fac8f5 (same two files); re-implementing an already-landed fix has no value, so 710 was ABANDONED in favor of the landed commit, and this ticket is linked duplicates -> b27d-269a-2ba3-43b4. AC1 VERIFIED live: from this venv-inside-repo checkout (.claude/worktrees/symfix, .venv inside repo root) at main 26fc779c0 (contains 7a0fac8f5), python -m pytest tests/unit/test_resolve_symbol_tool.py -q => 8 passed, including the previously-failing reproduction test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module. AC2 VERIFIED: the monkeypatched venv-inside-repo pin exists on main (test_resolve_symbol_repo_nested_venv_is_third_party). Bug is resolved on main.
